name: Smiles Fidelidade S.A.
summary: Smiles Fidelidade S.A. provides loyalty programs to financial institutions, retail and entertainment customers, airline partners, and individuals. The company focuses on the development and management of the loyalty program; the sale of redemption rights of awards; and the creation and management of individual and corporate database. It also operates travel agency. The company was formerly known as Webjet Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S.A. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Barueri, Brazil.
